text:
<https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-doc/2023-July/004013.html> for example. 

Readers will assume that the question was addressed to the list. 

Not so. 

The two To: addressees were named: 

FreeBSD Git administrators
FreeBSD Documentation Engineering Team

Is it possible to have context such as this obviously visible?
